title: Shipping Policy
content:
1. Shipping Coverage

We currently ship across India only. International shipping is not available at this time. We ship to all states and union territories served by our courier partners.

2. Processing Time

Orders are processed within 1–2 business days after payment confirmation. Orders placed on Sundays or public holidays will be processed the next business day. You will receive an email or WhatsApp notification with your tracking details once your order has been dispatched.

3. Delivery Timelines

  • Standard Delivery: 3–7 business days from the date of dispatch, depending on your location.
  • Express Delivery: 1–3 business days from dispatch (available at select pin codes; additional charges may apply).
  • Metro cities (Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Kolkata) typically receive orders at the lower end of the timeline.
  • Remote or rural areas may take up to 10 business days.

4. Shipping Charges

A flat shipping fee applies to all orders, which will be displayed at checkout.

5. Cash on Delivery (COD)

COD is available on orders up to ₹5,000 at select pin codes. A nominal COD handling fee of ₹50 is applicable. COD availability is confirmed at checkout based on your delivery pin code.

6. Courier Partners

We partner with trusted courier services including Shiprocket, Delhivery, Bluedart, Ecom Express, and DTDC to ensure safe and timely delivery of your orders. The courier partner assigned to your order is determined based on your pin code and availability.

7. Order Tracking

Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a tracking link via email and WhatsApp. You can use this link to track your shipment in real-time. Alternatively, visit the Track Order page on our website.

8. Unsuccessful Delivery Attempts

Our courier partners will make up to 3 delivery attempts. If the delivery is unsuccessful after 3 attempts (due to unavailability or wrong address), the package will be returned to us. In such cases, re-shipping charges will apply for a second delivery attempt. Please ensure you provide an accurate and complete delivery address and are available to receive the package.

9. Damaged Shipments

If you receive a package that appears damaged or tampered with, please do not accept it and contact us immediately via WhatsApp or at support@labelwink.co. We will arrange a replacement at no additional cost.

10. Contact

For shipping-related queries, please reach out via WhatsApp or email us at support@labelwink.co.
